meaning: n.铺砌石板,铺石材料,石板路adj.下垂的,衰弱的,委顿的,逐渐衰退(或减退,低落)的
examples: His enthusiasm was in no way flagging.
This movie is intended to revive her flagging career.
Despite numerous failures, they continued to conduct the experiment without flagging.
Home construction might be flagging, but industrial construction--office buildings, schools, airports, bridges--is poised for growth.
Banks send the feds 300, 000 "suspicious activity reports" a year flagging potential structuring or money laundering.
